reviews.review_msg: Mrs Caselli is one of the greatest profs at SFU, you won't regret taking this class with her.

She's an amazing prof.  She is the reason I decided to take Italian over Spanish.  She moves quickly but that is because there is too much to cover in the book. She always refers back to previous chapters and won't get mad if you make simple mistakes.
Took ITAL 100 and 101. Both were great.
She is the best prof i've had throught my university career. She's super helpful and really wants everyone to do well, i would definately recommend her.
She's super nice but she moves along so quickly and quizzes included material and vocab we never covered!

I took Vlad's class in Spring2020 (rip) and he handled the move online rlly well. He cares about his students and helps as much as he can to make sure everyone is solid with the content and knows what they're doing. He is patient and really fair with his marking, but you do have to show up, put in effort and make sure you ask for help when u need.
